case_title: THE HERTZ CORPORATION VS. LYDIA AGUIRRE ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-10-2019 CONTINUED TO MAY-22-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100053611) (TRANSACTION ID # 100053611) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HERTZ CORPORATION
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-02-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-22-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-02-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
